svg.title: ECDF — ECDFSeries
svg.desc: Ecdf chart titled "ECDF — ECDFSeries". X axis: Response Time (ms). Y axis: Cumulative Proportion. Series "Control": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 7.138381179385178) to 1 (at 89.40359124477027). Series "Treatment": 400 data points. Ranges from 0.0025 (at 33.82330947698575) to 1 (at 93.50689880894302).
